descriptionShort: Vernon Lakers beat Richmond Sockeyes 6-4 in Game 2 of BCJHL final series.
descriptionLong: The Vernon Lakers defeated the Richmond Sockeyes 6-4 on Sunday night to take a 2-0 lead in the best-of-seven B.C. Junior Hockey League final series. Despite blowing an early three-goal advantage, Vernon held on for the victory. Coach Ernie Gare attributed the team's sluggish second-period play to their narrow margin.

attribution.headline: Vernon Lakers Defeat Richmond Sockeyes in BCJHL Final
